docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,453.10 FILED BY MALTBY ELECTRIC SUPPLY CO., INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT LINKS ELECTRIC INC. A CAL CORP SURETY COMPANY OF THE PACIFIC A CALIF. CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-26-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-26-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUN-25-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
